overview: State-of-the-art clinic dedicated to helping men optimize health and manage the aging process through medically supervised treatments. Offers testosterone replacement therapy, body composition analysis, hair loss treatment, nutritional supplements, B-12 shots, and comprehensive health monitoring including bloodwork and blood pressure tracking.
highlights: TANITA body composition analysis using bioelectrical impedance
targetAudience: Men experiencing symptoms of low testosterone and andropause seeking medically supervised hormone optimization and comprehensive health management.
